evals.expected_output: Claude creates a session directory, invokes gemini CLI to review current changes, reads the output file, and presents a synthesis report
assertions: Creates a session directory under .ultra/collab/ with gemini-review in the name
Uses 'gemini -p' with --yolo flag to invoke Gemini CLI
Does NOT use '-o text' flag (Gemini outputs to stdout by default)
Redirects output to a file (> output.md)
Uses Read tool to read the output file
Presents a synthesis with Consensus and Divergent Views sections

evals.prompt: /gemini-collab compare 'Should we use Redis or Memcached for our caching layer?'
evals.expected_output: Claude answers independently first, then sends the same question to Gemini, reads output, and presents a comparative synthesis
assertions: Claude writes its own answer BEFORE invoking Gemini
Sends the question to Gemini without revealing Claude's position
Reads Gemini output with Read tool
Presents both analyses side by side with synthesis

evals.expected_output: Claude invokes Gemini in sandbox mode to analyze the project, reads output, and synthesizes with its own understanding
assertions: Uses gemini -p with a project analysis prompt
Redirects to file, reads with Read tool
Produces a unified project understanding report
